basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Centre Assistant. Candidates with Graduate/Post Graduate Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit SVNIT official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Post Graduate in Commerce/Science/Business Administrative or related fields, Minimum 4-5 years relevant work experience, Knowledge of government initiatives in urban planning and development, Proficiency in Microsoft Office, statistical and simulation software, Good communication skills in English and local language
